content.problemStatement:
You are given NNN sequences P1,P2,‚Ä¶,PNP_1, P_2, \dots, P_NP1‚Äč,P2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,PN‚Äč. Each of them is a permutation of numbers 111 through MMM.

Let's define a product of two permutations XXX and YYY of numbers 111 through MMM as a permutation Z=X‚čÖYZ = X\cdot YZ=X‚čÖY such that Zi=YXiZ_i=Y_{X_i}Zi‚Äč=YXi‚Äč‚Äč for each valid iii.

You should answer QQQ queries. Each query is described by two numbers LLL and RRR. Let's define a permutation B=PL‚čÖPL+1‚čÖ‚ÄČ‚Ä¶‚ÄČ‚čÖPRB = P_L \cdot P_{L+1} \cdot \,\dots\, \cdot P_RB=PL‚Äč‚čÖPL+1‚Äč‚čÖ‚Ä¶‚čÖPR‚Äč; the multiplication of permutations is evaluated left to right, i.e. as ((PL‚čÖPL+1)‚čÖ‚Ä¶‚ÄČ)‚čÖPR((P_L \cdot P_{L+1}) \cdot \dots) \cdot P_R((PL‚Äč‚čÖPL+1‚Äč)‚čÖ‚Ä¶)‚čÖPR‚Äč. The answer to a query is ‚ąĎi=1Mi‚čÖBi\sum_{i=1}^M i \cdot B_i‚ąĎi=1M‚Äči‚čÖBi‚Äč.
constraints: 1‚Č§Pi,j‚Č§M1 \le P_{i, j} \le M1‚Č§Pi,j‚Äč‚Č§M for each valid iii and jjj
for each valid iii, PiP_iPi‚Äč is permutation of numbers 111 through MMM
the sum of N‚čÖMN \cdot MN‚čÖM for all test cases does not exceed 2‚čÖ1052 \cdot 10^52‚čÖ105
the sum of QQQ for all test cases does not exceed 2‚čÖ1052 \cdot 10^52‚čÖ105
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers NNN and MMM.
NNN lines follow. For each valid iii, the iii-th of these lines contains MMM space-separated integers Pi,1,Pi,2,‚Ä¶,Pi,MP_{i, 1}, P_{i, 2}, \dots, P_{i, M}Pi,1‚Äč,Pi,2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,Pi,M‚Äč denoting the permutation PiP_iPi‚Äč.
The next line contains a single integer QQQ.
Each of the following QQQ lines contains two space-separated integers LLL and RRR describing one query.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print QQQ lines. For each valid iii, the iii-th of these lines should contain a single integer ‚ÄĒ the answer to the iii-th query.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Example case 1:

query 1: B=[3,2,1]B = [3, 2, 1]B=[3,2,1], so the answer is 1‚čÖ3+2‚čÖ2+3‚čÖ1=101\cdot 3 + 2\cdot 2 + 3\cdot 1 = 101‚čÖ3+2‚čÖ2+3‚čÖ1=10
query 2: B=[3,1,2]B = [3, 1, 2]B=[3,1,2], the answer is 111111
query 3: B=[2,3,1]B = [2, 3, 1]B=[2,3,1], the answer is 111111
query 4: B=[1,2,3]B = [1, 2, 3]B=[1,2,3], the answer is 141414
query 5: B=[2,3,1]B = [2, 3, 1]B=[2,3,1], the answer is 111111
